# terrible_community_general_ipa_subca (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `subca_name` (String) The Sub Certificate Authority name which needs to be managed.
- `subca_subject` (String) The Sub Certificate Authority's Subject, for example `CN=SampleSubCA1,O=testrelm.test`.

### Optional

- `state` (String) State to ensure. States `disable` and `enable` are available for FreeIPA 4.4.2 version and onwards.
- `subca_desc` (String) The Sub Certificate Authority's description.

### Read-Only

- `subca` (String) IPA Sub CA record as returned by IPA API.
